name: Snack Cart Shakedown
text:
Take the table snack. The player who had it gains 2 life as an apology, and you create a Favor token. Real friendly. Real one-sided.
If an opponent already owes you a Favor, also draw a card.
flavorText: "That's a nice pretzel cart. Whateverville's got a lot of weather. Be a shame if it rained on a cart."
